description: Style NoteAdd a pop of colour to your Summer wear wardrobe with this kurta from myntra. Featuring a colourful, all over floral print and made from pure cotton this piece scores high on style as well as comfort. Accessorise it with beaded bracelets and strappy wedge heels for an effortless yet inspired look.Product DetailsCream all over floral printed kurta, mandarin collar, short placket with hooks, yoke in front with gathered panel at the bottom, three quarter sleeves with self taping at sleeve hem, vented hem with self tapingMaterials and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model( height 5'8" and chest 33) is wearing a size M
